message:
feat(vc_store): translate migrations 001-009 to SQLite-compatible SQL (bd-dfl)

Port first 9 migration files from DuckDB to SQLite syntax per the
translation map in bd-axj. Key changes across all files:

- TIMESTAMP → TEXT (ISO-8601 strings)
- BOOLEAN → INTEGER (0/1), DEFAULT TRUE → 1, DEFAULT FALSE → 0
- BIGINT → INTEGER (SQLite integers are 64-bit)
- DOUBLE → REAL
- TEXT[] → TEXT (JSON arrays, query via json_each())
- DOUBLE[] → TEXT (JSON float arrays, 004 dna_embedding)
- VARCHAR → TEXT (drop size limits)
- DEFAULT current_timestamp → DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
- DATE → TEXT

Migration-specific:
- 003: CREATE TYPE ENUM removed, CHECK constraint added on entry_type
- 003: now() → datetime('now')
- 001: TEXT[] columns (tags, recipients, channels) → TEXT with JSON comments
- 004: DOUBLE[] (dna_embedding) → TEXT with JSON comment

Zero DuckDB-specific constructs remain in 001-009.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1,30 +1,31 @@
 -- Initial schema for Vibe Cockpit
 -- Migration 001: Core tables
+-- Translated from DuckDB to SQLite-compatible SQL (bd-dfl)
 
 -- Machine inventory
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS machines (
     machine_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
     hostname TEXT NOT NULL,
-    is_local BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
+    is_local INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
     ssh_host TEXT,
     ssh_user TEXT,
-    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
-    last_seen_at TIMESTAMP,
-    tags TEXT[], -- Array of tags
+    enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
+    last_seen_at TEXT,
+    tags TEXT, -- JSON array: '["tag1","tag2"]', query via json_each(tags)
     metadata_json TEXT,
-    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
-    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp
+    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
+    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
 );
 
 -- Collector status tracking
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collector_status (
     machine_id TEXT,
     collector_name TEXT,
-    last_run_at TIMESTAMP,
-    last_success_at TIMESTAMP,

-    duration_ms BIGINT,
+    duration_ms INTEGER,

@@ -1,24 +1,24 @@
 -- Knowledge Base schema
 -- Stores solutions, patterns, debug logs, and other learnings from agent sessions
+-- Translated from DuckDB to SQLite-compatible SQL (bd-dfl)
 
--- Knowledge entry types
-CREATE TYPE IF NOT EXISTS entry_type AS ENUM ('solution', 'pattern', 'prompt', 'debug_log');
+-- DuckDB ENUM removed: entry_type enforced via CHECK constraint below
 
 -- Main knowledge entries table
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_entries (
     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
-    entry_type VARCHAR NOT NULL,          -- solution, pattern, prompt, debug_log
-    title VARCHAR NOT NULL,
+    entry_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(entry_type IN ('solution', 'pattern', 'prompt', 'debug_log')),
+    title TEXT NOT NULL,
     summary TEXT,
     content TEXT NOT NULL,
-    source_session_id VARCHAR,            -- Link to cass session
-    source_file VARCHAR,
-    source_lines VARCHAR,                 -- "10-25" or NULL
-    tags VARCHAR[],
-    -- embedding FLOAT[1536],             -- For semantic search (future)
-    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
-    updated_at TIMESTAMP,
-    usefulness_score DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0,  -- Computed from feedback
+    source_session_id TEXT,            -- Link to cass session
+    source_file TEXT,
+    source_lines TEXT,                 -- "10-25" or NULL
+    tags TEXT,                         -- JSON array: '["rust","async"]', query via json_each(tags)
+    -- embedding FLOAT[1536],         -- For semantic search (future)
+    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
+    updated_at TEXT,
+    usefulness_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0, -- Computed from feedback
     view_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
     applied_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0
 );
@@ -27,10 +27,10 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_entries (

     comment TEXT,
-    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now()
+    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
 );

@@ -1,46 +1,47 @@

-    error_rate DOUBLE,

-    recovery_rate DOUBLE,
+    recovery_rate REAL,
 
     -- Tool usage
     tool_preferences JSON,
     tool_success_rates JSON,
-    avg_tools_per_task DOUBLE,
+    avg_tools_per_task REAL,
 
     -- Timing patterns
-    avg_response_time_ms DOUBLE,
-    p95_response_time_ms DOUBLE,
+    avg_response_time_ms REAL,
+    p95_response_time_ms REAL,
     time_of_day_distribution JSON,
 
     -- Task patterns
-    avg_task_completion_time_mins DOUBLE,
-    task_success_rate DOUBLE,
+    avg_task_completion_time_mins REAL,
+    task_success_rate REAL,
     complexity_handling JSON,
 
     -- Session patterns
-    avg_session_duration_mins DOUBLE,
-    avg_turns_per_session DOUBLE,
-    session_abandonment_rate DOUBLE,
+    avg_session_duration_mins REAL,
+    avg_turns_per_session REAL,
+    session_abandonment_rate REAL,
 
     -- 128-dimensional embedding for similarity search
-    dna_embedding DOUBLE[]
+    dna_embedding TEXT -- JSON array of floats: '[0.1, 0.2, ...]', query via json_each()
 );
 
 -- Indexes for common queries
@@ -51,10 +52,10 @@ CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_dna_computed ON agent_dna(computed_at);
 -- Historical DNA snapshots for drift detection
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dna_history (
     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
-    dna_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
-    computed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
+    dna_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+    computed_at TEXT NOT NULL,

-    change_summary VARCHAR,

@@ -1,25 +1,26 @@
 -- A/B testing experiments schema
 -- Enables controlled experiments with agent configurations

 -- Main experiments table

-    experiment_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,

-    primary_metric VARCHAR NOT NULL,

-    significance_threshold DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.05,
-    stop_early_on_significance BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,

+    stop_early_on_significance INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
     min_runtime_hours INTEGER,
     max_runtime_hours INTEGER,
-    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
-    created_by VARCHAR
+    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
+    created_by TEXT
 );
 
 -- Indexes for experiment queries
@@ -28,12 +29,12 @@ CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_experiments_created ON experiments(created_at);
